rationale: Rejected at the migration/data-integrity gate. Exact and approximate batch measurement can coexist; reversible snapshots omit product and source links; event timestamps do not deterministically order undo; archived products can hide active batches; and multi-batch FEFO does not check optimistic updates or opened-shelf-life effective expiry.

worker_package.objective: Repair the Pantry foundation integrity as one coherent slice: enforce mutually exclusive exact-versus-approximate measurements in validation and storage; make every reversible batch edit capture and restore product and source-link state; give events deterministic per-batch ordering for most-recent undo; prevent product archival from hiding active physical stock; make FEFO use effective expiry including opened shelf life; and fail atomically when any optimistic multi-batch deduction update does not change exactly one row. Add focused regression coverage without touching recipe availability, projected demand, or concurrent nutrition/reaction behavior.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/db/schema.ts src/lib/domain/pantry.ts src/lib/services/pantry-service.ts tests/unit/pantry.test.ts tests/integration/pantry-service.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/pantry-service.test.ts

git diff --check -- src/lib/db/schema.ts drizzle/0015_pantry_inventory.sql src/lib/domain/pantry.ts src/lib/services/pantry-service.ts tests/unit/pantry.test.ts tests/integration/pantry-service.test.ts
stop_if: Migration 0015 is found applied to any persistent, non-disposable, or shipped database; return that evidence before editing migration SQL so the PM can scope an additive migration.
The repair requires destructive migration behavior, mutation of data/our-recipes.db, or deletion of Pantry history.
The repair requires files outside allowed_files; return the exact missing paths before editing them.
Any change would overwrite or reformat unrelated nutrition, recipe-reaction, planner, cooking, API, page, CSS, documentation, or E2E work currently dirty in the worktree.
A profile is treated as an authorization boundary rather than signed ActorContext attribution.
Verification fails twice for a cause that cannot be fixed inside allowed_files.

blocked_tasks: Recipe availability and projected meal-demand integration until repair and re-audit pass.
missing_evidence: Regression proof for all five integrity defects and fresh migration alignment.
required_board_updates: Mark T005 done, activate T006 repair, then require a fresh Judge re-audit.
